response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with direct hits on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes. Current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops). Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java recency are minor relative to transferable depth.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TS/Node/React with strong testing/TDD culture
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP framework development at re:cinq
Polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent) with cloud/Docker/K8s exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in resume
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
PostgreSQL not mentioned; database experience skews toward MongoDB/MySQL
